topics.title: Python Variables and Basic Types
learning_objectives: Define variables using Python naming rules
Differentiate int, float, str, and bool
Use type conversion for simple input handling
topics.notes: Introduce assignment, type() inspection, and casting with int()/float()/str().

topics.title: Python Conditionals with if/elif/else
learning_objectives: Write boolean conditions with comparison operators
Avoid common indentation and condition-order mistakes
topics.notes: Focus on readable branching and practical examples like grading or login checks.

topics.title: Python for Loops and range()
learning_objectives: Iterate over lists and strings with for loops
Combine loops and conditionals for filtering tasks
topics.notes: Emphasize iteration patterns and beginner debugging habits.
